privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is a Maven project located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/EmployeeModel. The Employee class has 5 fields: firstName (String), lastName (String), employeeId (int), department (String), salary (double). The required methods to be generated are: 1 constructor taking all 5 fields in declaration order, 5 getters, 5 setters, toString(), hashCode(), and equals(). Success is verified by running the JUnit tests in src/test/java/com/example/model/EmployeeTest.java, which should show 5 passing tests in the Eclipse JUnit view.
